rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into implementation scope when binding to subcomponent ports or implementation-level state.
Place input/output contracts in component type scope only when using visible features and concrete, named bounds.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL scope boundaries: type annexes for visible interfaces, implementation annexes for internal bindings.
Ensure AGREE declarations use only int, real, or bool types aligned with AADL data port types.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use 'annex agree {** ... **};' for all AGREE content.
Relate outputs to inputs via visible ports only; avoid subcomponent paths in type-level contracts.
anti_patterns: Do not map Boolean ports to numeric comparisons unless explicitly defined as scalar in AADL.
Do not introduce implementation-specific paths into component type annexes.
